mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns show no statistical significance against a zero-mean null hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 6.0%, it signals a deteriorating labor market that triggers recession pricing, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 70% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 6.0%, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE is between 6.0% and 7.0%.

mechanism_narrative: The joint expansion of retail sales and industrial production confirms synchronized demand and supply growth, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields a negative coefficient in out-of-sample regression, or the signal fails to predict returns when only one series is trending upward.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns occur in 65% of high-inflation months, or the signal reverses direction when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 8% annually.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in industrial production reflects expanding corporate output capacity and revenue potential, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rolling 12-month correlation between INDPRO growth and SPX returns drops below 0.1, or forward returns are negative during periods of industrial expansion.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in housing starts below 800 thousand units indicates a collapsing construction sector and weak consumer confidence, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The signal produces positive returns in 60% of triggered months, or housing starts below 800.0 fail to correlate with subsequent equity drawdowns.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in total nonfarm payrolls and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm a robust labor market that supports consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative out-of-sample IC, or payrolls growth fails to predict returns when unemployment remains flat.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in real GDP confirms a recessionary environment that compresses corporate earnings expectations, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally in 70% of quarters following negative GDP prints, or the signal loses predictive accuracy when GDP contractions are shallow above minus 0.5%.
